ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parties table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Election year */,
  "office" TEXT /* The office the candidate is running for */,
  "primary_date" TEXT /* Date of the primary election */,
  "primary_type" TEXT /* Type of primary election */,
  "campaign_manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analysts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_campaign_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_manager_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES election_years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "endorsements" (
  "endorsement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endorsement */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the endorsement */,
  "endorser_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity or individual giving the endorsement */,
  "endorser_type" TEXT /* Type of endorser */,
  "endorsement_date" TEXT /* Date the endorsement was given */,
  "endorsement_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the endorsement */,
  "endorsement_points" INTEGER /* Total endorsement points for the candidate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the endorsement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endorsement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endorsements_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundraising" (
  "fundraising_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fundraising event */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate raising the money */,
  "fundraising_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fundraising event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of fundraising event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the fundraising event */,
  "total_donations" REAL /* Total donations received at the event */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount at the event */,
  "money_raised" REAL /* Total money raised in USD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the fundraising */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fundraising_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fundraising_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the primary election */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "delegate_count" INTEGER /* Number of delegates won by the candidate */,
  "primary_vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received in the primary */,
  "won_primary" TEXT /* Indicates if the candidate won the primary (Yes/No) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the primary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primary_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "party_ideology" TEXT /* Brief description of the party's ideology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The election year */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Brief description of the election cycle */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analysts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the analyst accessed the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst generating the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign strategy */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate employing the strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign strategy */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness rating of the strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign strategy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign strategy */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_strategies_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
